issue.message: Expecting an activity to have `android.intent.category.LEANBACK_LAUNCHER` intent filter
The result of `listener` is not used
The result of `listener` is not used
Hardware feature `android.hardware.touchscreen` not explicitly marked as optional
Expecting `<uses-feature android:name="android.software.leanback" android:required="false" />` tag
Call requires API level 28 (current min is 21): `android.content.pm.PackageInfo#getLongVersionCode`
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Windows file separators (`\`) and drive letter separators (':') must be escaped (`\\`) in property files; use C\\:/Users/cmoss/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk
Attribute `networkSecurityConfig` is only used in API level 24 and higher (current min is 21)
Attribute `supportsPictureInPicture` is only used in API level 24 and higher (current min is 21)
Attribute `width` is only used in API level 23 and higher (current min is 21)
Attribute `height` is only used in API level 23 and higher (current min is 21)
Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)
An activity in this app supports picture-in-picture and the targetSdkVersion is 31 or above; it is therefore strongly recommended to call both `setAutoEnterEnabled(true)` and `setSourceRectHint(...)`
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
A newer version of Gradle than 9.2.1 is available: 9.4.1
A newer version of `compileSdk` than 35 is available: 36
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.12.0 is available: 1.18.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.6.1 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of androidx.recyclerview:recyclerview than 1.3.2 is available: 1.4.0
A newer version of androidx.swiperefreshlayout:swiperefreshlayout than 1.1.0 is available: 1.2.0
A newer version of androidx.leanback:leanback than 1.0.0 is available: 1.2.0
A newer version of androidx.leanback:leanback-preference than 1.0.0 is available: 1.2.0
A newer version of androidx.media3:media3-exoplayer than 1.5.1 is available: 1.10.0
A newer version of androidx.media3:media3-exoplayer-hls than 1.5.1 is available: 1.10.0
A newer version of androidx.media3:media3-ui than 1.5.1 is available: 1.10.0
A newer version of androidx.media3:media3-ui-leanback than 1.5.1 is available: 1.10.0
A newer version of androidx.media3:media3-session than 1.5.1 is available: 1.10.0
A newer version of androidx.media3:media3-cast than 1.5.1 is available: 1.10.0
A newer version of com.google.android.gms:play-services-cast-framework than 22.0.0 is available: 22.3.1
A newer version of androidx.mediarouter:mediarouter than 1.7.0 is available: 1.8.1
A newer version of com.github.bumptech.glide:glide than 4.16.0 is available: 5.0.5
A newer version of com.github.bumptech.glide:okhttp3-integration than 4.16.0 is available: 5.0.5
A newer version of com.squareup.okhttp3:okhttp than 4.12.0 is available: 5.3.2
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android than 1.7.3 is available: 1.10.2
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-test than 1.7.3 is available: 1.10.2
A newer version of com.squareup.okhttp3:mockwebserver than 4.12.0 is available: 5.3.2
A newer version of org.json:json than 20231013 is available: 20251224
ComponentActivity.dispatchKeyEvent can only be called from within the same library group prefix (referenced groupId=`androidx.core` with prefix androidx from groupId=`GiantBombTV`)
ComponentActivity.dispatchKeyEvent can only be called from within the same library group prefix (referenced groupId=`androidx.core` with prefix androidx from groupId=`GiantBombTV`)

The attribute `android:allowBackup` is deprecated from Android 12 and higher and may be removed in future versions. Consider adding the attribute `android:dataExtractionRules` specifying an `@xml` resource which configures cloud backups and device transfers on Android 12 and higher.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
Very long vector path (3256 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Very long vector path (16918 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
